name: @wxyc/catalog-popularity-freetext-resolve
description: WXYC recurring cron (BS#1491 / catalog-popularity Phase-2 Track 1): resolve every distinct free-text (artist, album) pair from the flowsheet (album_id IS NULL) to a Discogs release (+master once LML Track 0 ships) via LML bulkLookupMetadata, UPSERTing verdicts into flowsheet_freetext_resolution. Re-attempts attempt_at IS NULL rows and no-match rows past a TTL. Default schedule 04:45 UTC; cooperative pause defers when DJs are active.
